title: Trimming Shop 9" Heavy Duty Square Dessert Plates Silver Disposable Plates 23cm, 14 Pack - Colour Themed Paper Tableware for BBQs, Weddings, Anniversary, Birthday, Multipurpose Occasions
features: 👑[DISPOSABLE PLATES]: These disposable square shaped paper plates have a size of 23cm (9"). These plates comes in a pack of 14pcs

👑[MATERIAL]: These plates are made from paper material. Durable and lightweight plates. Perfect for serving hot and cold meals. Heavy-duty plates so you do not need to worry about saucy foods are spills and messes

👑[PARTY DECORATION]: Ideal for your party decorations. Our plates are great for serving hot or cold meals at a wedding, birthday, baby shower, bridal shower, christening party, gender reveal party. Make your party decoration perfect with our disposable paper plates. Our plates are instantly lifts the décor of your space and add a charming opulence to the ambience of your event
👑[VIBRANT COLOURS]: These plates come in a range of vibrant & gorgeous colours which adds sparkle & richness to your event or dining party. Create a fresh clean canvas for any type of meal

👑[INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE]: These plates are suitable for indoor as well as outdoor use. These plates are perfect for dining parties, garden party, picnics, summer BBQs, Christmas dinner, luau party and more
description: Product Description Set a fantastic scene with these beautiful dinner set and add a decorative flair by completing the theme in the table setting Enhance your dining experience with this beautiful disposable dinnerware & set the scene for a meal to remember. This Dinnerware Set is an impressive detail that makes for a perfect dress-up for your table. Our beautiful dinnerware set comes in elegant various vibrant colours that lend a polished look and touch of class to your dining table. Perfect for weddings, birthdays, picnics, gardens, and BBQ parties. Our durable and luxurious tableware set is available in a sumptuous choice of colours that can be matched with the décor of the dining area. This elegant classic dining set will complement many decors and colour schemes Specification Square Plates The square plate available in 2 different sizes 7" (18cm) & 9" (23cm). Durable & lightweight plates. These plates are perfect for serving hot and cold meals Round Plates The round plates available in 2 different sizes 7" (18cm) & 9" (23cm). Durable & lightweight plates. These plates are perfect for serving hot and cold meals Cups This paper cups holds 266ml (9oz) of hot or cold fluid. Durable & lightweight disposable cups Napkins The napkin has a size of 6.5" x 6.5" (16.5cm x 16.5cm). 2 Ply soft napkins Vibrant Colours Party Tableware Make Your Party More Attractive This disposable party tableware includes many more items which you need for dinner, saves your time and is easy to match with a different theme party. Our tableware is ideal for your parties.
